description: Hang for 7 to 10s at 80% of your max strength, the goal is to make it hard but not impossible If you fail (slip or let go before the end) adjust the load. Repeat 3 - 5 times on different hold types. Full crimp shouldn't be used for this exercise
Do 4 reps of 30s hang - 30s rest, rest 1min and repeat 4times
Do 10 reps  between 2min and 3min of rest, repeat 3-5 times
